falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this key resistance level would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern assumption and indicate a bullish trend reversal

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of Bitcoin volume falls below 1.2 million BTC/day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate extreme market participation decay, contradicting the 'blowoff' score and suggesting a failed climax rather than a valid bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This policy action would directly counteract the 'bottom' pattern's implied bearish scenario, creating a clear contradiction to the current HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
